title: senecio schimperi
intro: Senecio schimperi, also known as African wormwood or bushwormwood, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to Eastern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Senecio schimperi include relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to treat malaria and other infectious diseases. In herbal preparations, Senecio schimperi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically in the form of creams or ointments.
